verification_blockers.issue: Automated tests could not be executed from the current workspace because the checked-in virtualenv only contains pip and the host Python does not have pytest installed.
evidence: python3 -m pytest -q -> No module named pytest

tasks.title: Stop mixing embedded kwota_b values into two-statement comparisons
tasks.problem: When /api/analysis/compare is given an explicit previous statement, missing tags in that previous statement fall back to the current statement's embedded kwota_b column. That silently mixes two different comparison sources and can report a previous value from the wrong year.
implementation_notes: Split comparison into two explicit modes: single-statement comparison that uses kwota_b, and two-statement comparison that uses only previous_stmt.
When previous_stmt is provided and a tag is absent there, return previous=null and null out derived change/share fields instead of falling back to node.kwota_b.
Review response-shape expectations for consumers before choosing between null and omitted fields.
acceptance_criteria: Comparing two statements never reads kwota_b from current_stmt.
A tag that exists only in current_stmt is represented as missing in the previous side, not as a fabricated historical value.
Regression tests cover mismatched statement shapes in bilans, RZiS, and cash flow trees.

tasks.title: Make available-period discovery complete and fail-safe
tasks.problem: _get_available_periods() only fetches page 0 with page_size=100, so companies with more than 100 filings lose older statements. The same function also swallows metadata errors and caches partial or empty results for an hour, turning transient upstream failures into false 404s.
implementation_notes: Paginate through all RDF search pages using metadaneWynikow until the document list is complete.
Treat metadata fetch failures as an upstream error, or mark the result incomplete and avoid caching it.
Only cache a period list after all required pages and metadata calls succeed.
acceptance_criteria: /api/analysis/available-periods returns every eligible period even when the entity has more than 100 filings.
/api/analysis/statement and /api/analysis/time-series can resolve periods that live past the first search page.
A temporary metadata failure does not poison the cache with an empty or partial period list.

tasks.title: Select the real statement XML from downloaded ZIP archives
tasks.problem: extract_xml_from_zip() returns the first XML file alphabetically. RDF downloads can contain multiple XML artifacts, so signed packages can hand the parser a signature XML instead of the financial statement.
implementation_notes: Inspect every XML member in the ZIP and choose the one that parses into an expected statement shape, for example a root containing Bilans, RZiS, or RachPrzeplywow.
Fail with a clear parse error when no valid statement XML is present instead of returning the first XML blindly.
Keep the parser tolerant of additional signature or manifest files in the archive.
acceptance_criteria: A ZIP containing both signature XML and statement XML selects the statement XML.
Analysis endpoints return a structured client-facing error when a ZIP has no parseable statement XML.
Regression tests cover multi-XML ZIP archives.

tasks.title: Translate upstream transport failures into explicit proxy errors
tasks.problem: The API only handles httpx.HTTPStatusError. Timeouts, DNS failures, and connection resets raise httpx.RequestError and currently bubble out as unhandled 500 responses.
implementation_notes: Add an exception handler for httpx.RequestError and map it to 502 or 504 with enough context for debugging.
Consider normalizing parsing/downloading failures in the analysis flow to the same proxy-error contract where appropriate.
Add endpoint tests that monkeypatch rdf_client calls to raise transport exceptions.
acceptance_criteria: Transport-level upstream failures no longer surface as generic 500 responses.
The error payload stays consistent with the existing upstream proxy contract.
Tests cover timeout and connection-error cases.

tasks.title: Replace the ad-hoc global cache with a bounded TTL cache
tasks.problem: The analysis cache never evicts expired keys and has no size limit. Every unique KRS and document_id remains in memory until process restart, which creates unbounded growth under repeated use.
implementation_notes: Swap the dict-based cache for a bounded TTL/LRU cache or add explicit eviction on get/set.
Purge expired entries eagerly so stale keys do not accumulate forever.
Expose cache behavior in code comments or settings so operators can tune it.
acceptance_criteria: Expired entries are removed instead of remaining resident forever.
Cache growth is bounded under a stream of unique KRS/document requests.
Existing cache hits for parsed statements and period lists still work.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for analysis logic and remove the crypto test's hour-boundary flake
tasks.problem: The test suite only exercises health, lookup, search, download, and basic crypto behavior. None of the analysis endpoints or xml_parser branches are covered, and test_can_decrypt_to_verify_structure() depends on a separate datetime.now() call that can fail at an hour rollover.
implementation_notes: Add endpoint-level tests for /api/analysis/available-periods, /statement, /compare, and /time-series with mocked RDF client responses.
Add parser-focused unit tests for XML selection, comparison mode, and ratio computation.
Stabilize the crypto test by freezing/injecting time instead of calling datetime.now() independently inside the test.
acceptance_criteria: Analysis regressions can be caught without hitting the real RDF service.
The crypto suite no longer has an hour-boundary race.
New tests cover the failure modes in CR-001 through CR-004.
